opportunities.title: Enable UPI Intent
opportunities.insight: 60% of customers attempt UPI but only Collect is enabled.
opportunities.description: UPI demand is high; enabling UPI Intent can capture one-tap payments.
opportunities.aiImpact: Estimated +3–5% conversion uplift and lower drop-off at payment step.
aiSuggestions: Enable UPI Intent on payment page.
Keep Collect as fallback.
Monitor UPI success rate post enablement.

opportunities.title: Retry Optimization
opportunities.insight: 28% of failed payments succeed on retry.
opportunities.description: High recoverable failures; smart retry can recover revenue without customer friction.
opportunities.aiImpact: Enabling Smart Retry can recover a significant share of failed transactions.
aiSuggestions: Enable Smart Retry Logic for failed transactions.
Set retry window and max attempts per payment method.
Track retry success rate by method.

opportunities.title: EMI Option Not Surfaced for High-Value Orders
opportunities.insight: Orders above ₹5,000 show 34% higher abandonment; no-cost EMI not visible.
opportunities.description: High AOV; EMI can reduce abandonment and increase conversion.
opportunities.aiImpact: Surfacing no-cost EMI for ₹5K+ could recover ~20–25% of high-value abandonments.
aiSuggestions: Show EMI eligibility on PDP and cart for ₹5K+.
A/B test EMI placement.
Monitor EMI mix and conversion.

opportunities.title: Card Tokenization Adoption at 28% — Below 60% Target
opportunities.insight: Repeat customers but only 28% have tokenized cards.
opportunities.description: Tokenization reduces friction and improves repeat purchase success rate.
opportunities.aiImpact: Moving to 60% tokenization can improve card SR and reduce checkout friction.
aiSuggestions: Prompt for save card after successful payment.
Pre-check "Save for next time" for returning users.
Track tokenization rate by cohort.

opportunities.title: International Card Acceptance Not Configured
opportunities.insight: Foreign IP traffic and cross-border transactions being declined.
opportunities.description: No multi-currency or international Visa/MC configured.
opportunities.aiImpact: Enabling international cards can capture inbound/NRI orders.
aiSuggestions: Enable multi-currency and international Visa/MC.
Show "Pay in INR" where relevant.
Track international card volume and declines.

opportunities.title: Subscription Payments Not Enabled — Recurring Revenue
opportunities.insight: Swiggy One has recurring billing potential; no e-mandate/SI active.
opportunities.description: Mandate creation and recurring success below benchmark.
opportunities.aiImpact: E-mandate/SI could add ~8–12% stable volume and improve retention.
aiSuggestions: Enable e-mandate for renewals.
Improve consent flow; consider UPI autopay.
Track mandate creation and recurring success.

opportunities.title: MID Routing Optimization
opportunities.insight: MID-A has 91% success rate while MID-B has 78%.
opportunities.description: One MID performing significantly better; routing can improve overall SR.
opportunities.aiImpact: Routing more transactions to higher-success MID can lift overall success rate.
aiSuggestions: Analyze traffic split across MIDs.
Route or recommend routing to higher-success MID where feasible.
Monitor MID-level SR post change.

opportunities.title: Industry Benchmark Gap — Authorization Rate
opportunities.insight: Your authorization rate is 6% lower than merchants in your category.
opportunities.description: Merchant success rate below industry; payment optimization recommended.
opportunities.aiImpact: Recommend payment optimization playbook aligned to peer benchmarks.
aiSuggestions: Compare payment method mix and SR vs MCC peers.
Prioritize top 3 levers (e.g. routing, retry, method order).
Set target and track weekly.

alerts.title: Success Rate Drop
alerts.description: Success rate dropped from 96% to 85% in last 30 minutes.
alerts.triggerSignal: Success rate drops >10% in last 30 min
alerts.recommendedAction: Investigate bank outage or routing issue

alerts.title: Bank Failure Spike — HDFC
alerts.description: Failures concentrated in one issuer; 28% of card declines from HDFC in last 72h.

alerts.title: UPI Success Rate Below Threshold
alerts.description: UPI SR dropped to 91.3% vs 96% benchmark. PSP routing failures causing 38% of declines.
alerts.recommendedAction: Investigate PSP or network outage; enable fallback routing

alerts.title: Recurring Payment Failure Spike
alerts.description: Recurring failure rate spike in last 5 days; affecting 22% of net banking.
alerts.recommendedAction: Check token expiry or mandate issues

alerts.title: Fraud Spike — Abnormal Patterns
alerts.description: Abnormal fraud score patterns in last 24h.
alerts.recommendedAction: Enable stricter fraud rules or review rules
